home.title: Milkshakespeare
home.subtitle: Where Every Sip Tells a Story
home.heroTagline: Craft milkshakes inspired by the greatest literary works of all time.
home.aboutText: Born from a love of classic literature and artisanal milkshakes, Milkshakespeare brings you handcrafted shakes that are as rich in flavor as the tales that inspire them.
home.featuredRomeoDesc: A passionate blend of strawberries, raspberries, and a hint of rose.
home.featuredHamletDesc: To drink or not to drink — a deep, brooding dark chocolate shake.
home.featuredMidsummerDesc: Lavender, vanilla bean, and honeycomb in a dreamy swirl.
home.ctaText: Visit us today and discover how the world's greatest stories taste in a glass.

menu.title: The Menu
menu.subtitle: Every shake, a masterpiece
menu.romeoDesc: Strawberry, raspberry, rose water, vanilla bean ice cream
menu.hamletDesc: Belgian dark chocolate, espresso shot, whipped cream
menu.macbethDesc: Dark mocha, caramel, toffee crumble, midnight cocoa
menu.midsummerDesc: Lavender, vanilla bean, honeycomb, edible flowers
menu.tempestDesc: Mango, passion fruit, coconut cream, lime zest
menu.twelfthNightDesc: Espresso, mascarpone, ladyfinger crumble, cocoa dusting
menu.henryDesc: Salted caramel, butter pecan, crown-shaped wafer
menu.richardDesc: Golden milk, turmeric, honey, cinnamon, almond butter
menu.sonnet18Desc: Peach, apricot, vanilla, a drizzle of golden honey
menu.sonnet130Desc: Classic vanilla with real strawberries — simple and true

about.title: About Milkshakespeare
about.headerSubtitle: Where literature meets the art of milkshake making
about.storyText: Milkshakespeare was founded with a singular vision: to marry the timeless art of storytelling with the joyful craft of milkshake making. Every shake on our menu is inspired by Shakespeare's greatest works, blending premium ingredients with literary imagination.
about.missionText: We believe that great food should be an experience. Each visit to Milkshakespeare is a journey through the pages of classic literature, served in a glass.
about.valueCraft: Craftsmanship — Every shake is made to order with premium, locally sourced ingredients.
about.valueCreativity: Creativity — We push the boundaries of flavor, just as Shakespeare pushed the boundaries of language.
about.valueCommunity: Community — Our space is a gathering place for lovers of good taste and great stories.
